title: Senior Applied AI Engineer
description:
Senior Backend Engineer, Applied AI

Why Clarium?

Our mission is to accelerate healthcare transformation
through our AI-powered platform. We strive toward a future
where hospitals are at the cutting edge of technology,
operations and efficiency. Healthcare workers are inundated
with endless tasks, manual processes and often unintuitive
tools. Clarium is transforming healthcare by empowering
providers with AI-powered software with intelligent workflow
automation and actionable insights.

We envision a future where all hospitals leverage our
collaborative data platform to automate their daily
operational and administrative tasks, only surfacing high
complexity issues that truly require their expertise.

We're backed by some of the biggest and most innovative
investors in the world including: Northzone, General
Catalyst, AlleyCorp, 1984 Ventures, Alumni Ventures, and
others.

Role Overview

I'm Dr. Marek Sirendi, Head of AI at Clarium! Since this
role will work closely with me, rather than a generic job
description, I thought I'd tell you exactly what I'm looking
for.

As we continue scaling our AI capabilities, I'm looking for
a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Applied AI team.
You'll collaborate with engineering, data, and product teams
to build secure, scalable, and high-performance AI
applications that improve healthcare supply chain operations
with data-driven insights. This is an opportunity to have
real impact, building systems that directly help healthcare
providers work more efficiently.

Responsibilities

- Architect and develop robust backend systems to integrate
  with proprietary LLM APIs

- Take ownership of critical system components, from backend
  APIs to AI agent implementation

- Design and develop scalable back-end services using Python
  and FastAPI

- Collaborate with internal product managers and customers to
  align product development with real-world needs

Requirements

- Demonstrated experience in building and deploying AI
  applications

- Understanding of backend architecture principles and AI
  application design best practices

- Experience working with RESTful APIs and integrating third-
  party services

- Strong understanding of database technologies

- Self-motivated with excellent problem-solving and
  communication skills

Nice-to-Haves

- Support infrastructure management using Kubernetes and
  Terraform

- Prior experience at an early-stage startup

Skills and Tools You Will Use

Need to Know:

Python, FastAPI, SQL, RESTful APIs

Nice to Know:

LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic), Kubernetes, Terraform

What Success Looks Like

At Clarium we love to outline a 90-day success plan in our
Job Descriptions but understand this can of course change
based on company priorities or the person we hire. We hope
this will at least give you an idea of what to anticipate.

At 1 Week:

Complete onboarding, meet the team, and understand our
codebase architecture and AI systems.

At 1 Month:

Ship your first feature or improvement to our AI backend
systems. Participate actively in sprint planning and code
reviews.

At 3 Months:

Own a significant component of our AI infrastructure.
Demonstrate impact through measurable improvements in system
performance, reliability, or capability.

What You Get At Clarium

- Incentive Stock Options proportionate to salary

- Fully remote work

- Unlimited PTO

- Top-tier health, vision, and dental benefits

Our Hiring Process

Apply

We read every application and make our best effort to reply
to everyone. Please read the job description carefully. We
love when people strive but if you do not meet more than 75%
of the requirements, we are less likely to respond. Please
take your time on any application questions—we view them as
your opportunity to stand out.

Exploratory Interview

Goal: High-level qualifications & mutual fit. 30-minute
video interview with a team member who knows the product and
role well. We make sure to preserve 10 minutes for your
questions.

Hiring Manager Interview

Goal: Deeper understanding of team needs and your
qualifications. 60-minute video interview with the hiring
manager. You will get a general idea of topics in advance.

Technical Interview and Values Interview

Goal: Deep dive into your skills, knowledge, and problem
solving. 1-hour technical exercise. This is a realistic
interview with no abstract puzzles. We will send you
information in advance and do a live exercise together.
Screen sharing is expected.

Values Goal: Meet more of the team and understand what
values are important to you. 60-minute video interview with
2 team members. We will provide guidance in advance.

CEO Interview

Goal: Spend 30 minutes getting to know our CEO to help
decide if this is a great mutual fit for everyone involved.
responsibilities: Architect and develop robust backend systems to integrate with proprietary LLM APIs
Take ownership of critical system components, from backend APIs to AI agent implementation
Design and develop scalable back-end services using Python and FastAPI
Collaborate with internal product managers and customers to align product development with real-world needs
Build secure, scalable, and high-performance AI applications that improve healthcare supply chain operations
Own significant components of AI infrastructure and drive measurable improvements in system performance and capability
use_cases: Healthcare supply chain operations optimization through data-driven insights
Intelligent workflow automation for daily operational and administrative tasks in hospitals
Automating routine hospital operations to surface only high-complexity issues requiring human expertise
AI-powered software providing actionable insights to healthcare providers
Reducing manual processes and improving efficiency for healthcare workers with AI-driven tools
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an Applied AI Engineer role that involves building
AI applications, integrating with proprietary LLM APIs, and
implementing AI agents. The role requires hands-on
experience deploying AI applications and working directly
with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) rather than just
supporting infrastructure.
